SignIn.title: Sign in
SignIn.useEffectErrorMessage: Please, try later or sign up - in case you are a new user.

HomePage.projectText: RESTful Client App is a lightweight and user-friendly tool for interacting with RESTful APIs. It supports common HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.), allows you to send requests, customize headers, and manage variables. The app also keeps history of your API calls, making it easy to reuse and test APIs. Inspired by tools like Postman, this project provides a simple but powerful environment for developers, testers, and API architects.
HomePage.courseText: This project was created as part of the RS School React Course. RS School is a free educational program for aspiring web developers. The course covers JavaScript, React, state management (Redux, Context API), API integration, and modern development practices. Everyone can study at RS School regardless of age, background, or location. It is a great opportunity to gain practical skills and work on real projects in a team.

UserGreeting.title: Hello
UserGreeting.text: Glad to see you again. You can continue working with the API right now

marina.name: Marina Kholodova
marina.bio: I'm Marina, a frontend developer. I'm inspired by mountains and snowboarding — that's how I recharge. I got into development because I was interested in web technologies, which turned into a passion for creating user-friendly and modern interfaces. I like making interfaces that are easy to understand and fun to use.

aliaksandra.name: Aliaksandra Palkhouskaya
aliaksandra.bio: I started my journey in IT with HTML and CSS, and then I realized that I wanted more, so JavaScript, then React completely took over my mind. My goal - is to create convenient, modern and productive web applications that solve real user problems. I like: coding learning new technologies and applying them in practice, have the results of my work in real projects.

denis.name: Denis Yakovchik
denis.bio: I'm Denis, a front-end developer. My journey into development began during my university studies, where I initially learned to develop desktop applications. Over time, I realized that web technologies were much more interesting to me, after which I took my first steps in front-end development. In my free time, I enjoy walking and playing board games. I strive to further improve my skills and create products that are useful to people.

name.regex: Name should contain only letters, you can add your full name or short

password.digit: Password should contain at least one digit
password.special: Password should contain at least one special char
